How We Work

The best results start with the right team

Better outcomes begin long before the first rod turns. At Blick, we work beside you from design through to project completion — helping you deliver results your clients can rely on.

Our Process

Working with you at every stage

01

Tender & Planning

We're there to back your expertise, strengthen your proposal, and give your team the confidence to lead the conversation. Every tender sets the tone for what follows — and we make sure yours stands out.

02

Fluid Design

No two sites are the same. We match the right fluids and partner products to your conditions — improving hole stability, reducing risk, and keeping operations moving smoothly from the first metre down.

03

Execution & On-Site Support

When the job starts, Blick is by your side. We give you the tools, fluids, and confidence to get on with the job — knowing the logistics and expertise are behind you. Our team stands with you in the field.

04

Review & Improvement

Success isn't measured by what we sell, but by how well your project runs. After every job, we review what worked and refine what didn't — building the insight that makes every next project stronger.

What Sets Us Apart

Every solution is unique

We combine proven fluids with real-world expertise. Our goal is simple: to help you be the team everyone wants on the next job — the one known for getting it right.

Our team doesn't just supply products — we stand with you in the field, helping your crew make clear, confident decisions that keep progress steady and downtime low.

Local stock, fast delivery

Fluids stocked locally across AU and NZ. Logistics that move fast when the ground changes.

Real people who answer the phone

When you call Blick, you reach someone who knows drilling, logistics, and what it takes to keep work moving.

Technical depth, not just product supply

From fluid design to on-site consulting — we bring the expertise that turns challenges into results.

A partner with skin in the game

Our team cares about your success as much as their own — because ownership builds accountability and pride.

Industry Expertise

Where we work across Australasia

HDD & Trenchless

Helping contractors and consultants design, plan, and execute trenchless crossings that stay on line and on grade.

Geotechnical & Diamond Coring

Engineering drilling fluids that reduce torque, improve core recovery, and prove capability in complex ground.

Waterwell & Dewatering

Balancing cleaning, stabilisation, and speed to protect hole integrity and equipment performance.

Piling, Tunnelling & Construction

Designing and supporting fluid systems that keep foundations stable and sites productive.

Oilfield & Geothermal

Applying water-based fluid design and on-site support to high-spec, high-pressure operations.

Training & Knowledge

Lifting standards.
Lifting the industry.

Through Blick Mud Schools, we share practical insight that turns know-how into better decisions and stronger performance. We train drillers, engineers, and consultants to understand fluids and use them effectively.

Register Interest
Let's Talk

Every project is different.
Success comes from the same place.

Working together. Let's talk about yours.
